name: Mozzarella Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix beef, eggs, crumbs, milk, parmesan cheese, onion, salt and oregano.
2. Shape into a loaf and place in a greased 9 x 5 x 3 inch loaf pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 1 - 1/4 hours or until no pink remains; drain.
4. Spoon pizza sauce over loaf and top with cheese slices.
5. Return to the oven for 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
6. Meanwhile, if desired, saute green pepper and mushrooms in butter; arrange on top of meat loaf.
